name: Mobile New File Guide
description: When a new file is created in the mobile directory, ensure it follows the project structure conventions

then.prompt: A new TypeScript/React file was created in the mobile project. Verify it follows conventions: screens go in src/screens/, shared components in src/components/, utilities in src/utils/. If it's a new screen, remind to add it to the Screen type union in App.tsx and update the mobile steering doc and README.
